title: Refined Dogs
description: Updates the wolf model to have 50+ breeds and 60+ textures [Forge/Fabric]
body:
![Refined dogs requires etf and emf to work](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/47450ae72a95f666bdcac84f9dd7ba5d5beec9d8.png)


![50+ Breeds](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/6bcfb7cefd2a51c26b0c1ff0db368c83888b0f4b.png)
![white outline logo](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/7aa81fb0e1132edc3f3e6e5e68257eb7be49ae10.png)

Refined Dogs is a resource pack that aims to expand upon the wolf, adding 50+ breeds and 60+ textures to the game



Things such as puppy models, variants, and animation will be added in the future!

Support is currently 1.20+ and above

![all dog breed variants](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/2c6ef336f1177fe736e7f90bb6329a95b3dd13d1.png)

![breeds | nametag](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/b58accb1bee6463df0b0a4ab21ae6470547ae708.png)

In case you want a specific breed, that can be done using nametags!

Using the names on the right (which are linked to the breeds on the left) you can rename the nametag in an anvil to the same name. When you right click a tamed wolf with it, it will change the texture

![all nametag variants](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/6c525fe04dff53c7b53c389be1567b9aa438f23a_0.webp)
![special nametag variants](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/af79eacbc3348b7209bec368f784e433e1cd9ff6.png)

If you run into any bugs or issues, let me know!
